Constant.description: Constant are constants that can be used to dynamically template K8s resources or run in actions.

autoIndent.description: Whether to automatically indent the variable's value (if multiline) when templating. Based on the number of chars before the start of ###ZARF_CONST_.

description.description: A description of the constant to explain its purpose on package create or deploy confirmation prompts

name.description: The name to be used for the constant

pattern.description: An optional regex pattern that a constant value must match before a package can be created.

value.description: The value to set for the constant during deploy

GitRepoSource.description: GitRepoSource represents a Helm chart stored in a Git repository.

path.description: The sub directory to the chart within a git repo.

url.description: The URL of the git repository where the helm chart is stored.

HelmRepoSource.description: HelmRepoSource represents a Helm chart stored in a Helm repository.

name.description: The name of a chart within a Helm repository (defaults to the Zarf name of the chart).

url.description: The URL of the chart repository where the helm chart is stored.

version.description: The version of the chart to deploy.

ImageArchive.description: ImageArchive defines a tar archive of images to include in the package.

images.description: The list of images contained in the archive.

path.description: The path to the tar archive.

Injector.description: Injector defines the configuration for the Zarf injector.

InjectorValues.description: InjectorValues defines configurable values for the Zarf injector.

InteractiveVariable.description: InteractiveVariable is a variable that can be used to prompt a user for more information

autoIndent.description: Whether to automatically indent the variable's value (if multiline) when templating. Based on the number of chars before the start of ###ZARF_VAR_.

default.description: The default value to use for the variable

description.description: A description of the variable to be used when prompting the user a value

name.description: The name to be used for the variable

pattern.description: An optional regex pattern that a variable value must match before a package deployment can continue.

prompt.description: Whether to prompt the user for input for this variable

sensitive.description: Whether to mark this variable as sensitive to not print it in the log

type.description: Changes the handling of a variable to load contents differently (i.e. from a file rather than as a raw variable - templated files should be kept below 1 MiB)

LocalRepoSource.description: LocalRepoSource represents a Helm chart stored locally.

path.description: The path to a local chart's folder or .tgz archive.

OCISource.description: OCISource represents a Helm chart stored in an OCI registry.

url.description: The URL of the OCI registry where the helm chart is stored.

version.description: The version of the chart to deploy.

SetValue.description: SetValue declares a value that can be set during a package deploy.

key.description: Key represents which value to assign to.

type.description:
Type declares the kind of data being stored in the value. JSON and YAML types ensure proper formatting when
inserting the value into the template. Defaults to SetValueString behavior when empty.

value.description: Value is the current value at the key.

Shell.description: Shell represents the desired shell to use for a given command

darwin.description: (default 'sh') Indicates a preference for the shell to use on macOS systems

linux.description: (default 'sh') Indicates a preference for the shell to use on Linux systems

windows.description: (default 'powershell') Indicates a preference for the shell to use on Windows systems (note that choosing 'cmd' will turn off migrations like touch -> New-Item)

Variable.description: Variable represents a variable that has a value set programmatically

autoIndent.description: Whether to automatically indent the variable's value (if multiline) when templating. Based on the number of chars before the start of ###ZARF_VAR_.

name.description: The name to be used for the variable

pattern.description: An optional regex pattern that a variable value must match before a package deployment can continue.

sensitive.description: Whether to mark this variable as sensitive to not print it in the log

type.description: Changes the handling of a variable to load contents differently (i.e. from a file rather than as a raw variable - templated files should be kept below 1 MiB)

VersionRequirement.description: VersionRequirement specifies a minimum Zarf version needed and the reason for the requirement.

reason.description: The reason this version is required.

version.description: The minimum version of Zarf required.

ZarfBuildData.description: ZarfBuildData is written during the packager.Create() operation to track details of the created package.

aggregateChecksum.description: Checksum of a checksums.txt file that contains checksums all the layers within the package.

apiVersion.description: The API version defined in the package definition used to build the package.

architecture.description: The architecture this package was created on.

differential.description: Whether this package was created with differential components.

differentialPackageVersion.description: Version of a previously built package used as the basis for creating this differential package.

flavor.description: The flavor of Zarf used to build this package.

migrations.description: Any migrations that have been run on this package.

provenanceFiles.description:
ProvenanceFiles lists files present in the package that are not included in checksums.txt.
These are files added after checksum generation (e.g., signature files).

registryOverrides.description: Any registry domains that were overridden on package create when pulling images.

terminal.description: The machine name that created this package.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when this package was created.

user.description: The username who created this package.

version.description: The version of Zarf used to build this package.

versionRequirements.description: Requirements for specific Zarf versions needed to deploy this package.

ZarfChart.description: ZarfChart defines a helm chart to be deployed.

git.description: The Git repo where the chart is stored.

helmRepo.description: The Helm repo where the chart is stored.

local.description: The local path where the chart is stored.

name.description: The name of the chart within Zarf; note that this must be unique and does not need to be the same as the name in the chart repo.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the chart to.

oci.description: The OCI registry where the chart is stored.

releaseName.description: The name of the Helm release to create (defaults to the Zarf name of the chart).

schemaValidation.description: Whether to validate the chart's values against its JSON schema. Defaults to true.

serverSideApply.description:
Controls whether Helm uses Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) when deploying this chart.
  - "true":  always use SSA
  - "false": always use CSA
  - "auto":  use SSA for fresh installs; for upgrades, match whichever strategy
             was used when the chart was first installed
Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

values.description: List of values sources to their Helm override target.

valuesFiles.description: List of local values file paths or remote URLs to include in the package; these will be merged together when deployed.

wait.description: Whether to wait for chart resources to be ready before continuing. Defaults to true.

ZarfChartValue.description: ZarfChartValue maps a values source path to a Helm chart target path.

sourcePath.description: The source path for the value.

targetPath.description: The target path within the Helm chart values.

ZarfComponent.description: ZarfComponent is the primary functional grouping of assets to deploy by Zarf.

actions.description: Custom commands to run at various stages of a package lifecycle.

charts.description: Helm charts to install during package deploy.

default.description: Determines the default Y/N state for installing this component on package deploy.

description.description: Message to include during package deploy describing the purpose of this component.

features.description: Features of the Zarf CLI to enable for this component.

files.description: Files or folders to place on disk during package deployment.

imageArchives.description: List of tar archives of images to include in the package.

images.description: List of OCI images to include in the package.

import.description: Import a component from another Zarf component config.

manifests.description: Kubernetes manifests to be included in a generated Helm chart on package deploy.

only.description: Filter when this component is included in package creation or deployment.

optional.description: Do not prompt user to install this component. Defaults to false, meaning the component is required.

repos.description: List of git repos to include in the package.

ZarfComponentAction.description: ZarfComponentAction represents a single action to run during a zarf package operation.

cmd.description: The command to run. Must specify either cmd or wait for the action to do anything.

description.description: Description of the action to be displayed during package execution instead of the command.

dir.description: The working directory to run the command in (default is CWD).

env.description: Additional environment variables to set for the command.

mute.description: Hide the output of the command during package deployment (default false).

retries.description: Retry the command if it fails up to given number of times (default 0).

setValues.description: An array of values to set with the output of the command.

setVariables.description: (onDeploy/cmd only) An array of variables to update with the output of the command. These variables will be available to all remaining actions and components in the package.

shell.description: (cmd only) Indicates a preference for a shell for the provided cmd to be executed in on supported operating systems.

template.description: Disable go-template processing on the cmd field.

timeout.description: Timeout for the command (default to 0, no timeout for cmd actions and 5 minutes for wait actions).

wait.description: Wait for a condition to be met before continuing. Must specify either cmd or wait for the action. See the 'zarf tools wait-for' command for more info.

ZarfComponentActionDefaults.description: ZarfComponentActionDefaults sets the default configs for child actions.

mute.description: Hide the output of commands during execution (default false).

retries.description: Retry commands given number of times if they fail (default 0).

shell.description: (cmd only) Indicates a preference for a shell for the provided cmd to be executed in on supported operating systems.

timeout.description: Default timeout for commands (default no timeout).

ZarfComponentActionSet.description: ZarfComponentActionSet is a set of actions to run during a zarf package operation.

after.description: Actions to run at the end of an operation.

before.description: Actions to run at the start of an operation.

defaults.description: Default configuration for all actions in this set.

onFailure.description: Actions to run if all operations fail.

ZarfComponentActionWait.description: ZarfComponentActionWait specifies a condition to wait for before continuing

cluster.description: Wait for a condition to be met in the cluster before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

network.description: Wait for a condition to be met on the network before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

ZarfComponentActionWaitCluster.description: ZarfComponentActionWaitCluster specifies a condition to wait for before continuing

condition.description: The condition or jsonpath state to wait for; defaults to kstatus readiness checks.

kind.description: The kind of resource to wait for.

name.description: The name of the resource or selector to wait for.

namespace.description: The namespace of the resource to wait for.

ZarfComponentActionWaitNetwork.description: ZarfComponentActionWaitNetwork specifies a condition to wait for before continuing

code.description: The HTTP status code to wait for if using http or https.

ZarfComponentActions.description: ZarfComponentActions are ActionSets that map to different zarf package operations.

onCreate.description: Actions to run during package creation.

onDeploy.description: Actions to run during package deployment.

onRemove.description: Actions to run during package removal.

ZarfComponentFeatures.description: ZarfComponentFeatures defines features of the Zarf CLI to enable for a component.

isAgent.description: Whether this component provides an agent.

isRegistry.description: Whether this component provides a registry.

ZarfComponentImport.description: ZarfComponentImport structure for including imported Zarf components.

path.description: The path to the component config file to import.

url.description: The URL to a Zarf component config to import via OCI.

ZarfComponentOnlyCluster.description: ZarfComponentOnlyCluster represents the architecture and K8s cluster distribution to filter on.

architecture.description: Only create and deploy to clusters of the given architecture.

distros.description: A list of kubernetes distros this package works with (Reserved for future use).

ZarfComponentOnlyTarget.description: ZarfComponentOnlyTarget filters a component to only show it for a given local OS and cluster.

cluster.description: Only deploy component to specified clusters.

flavor.description: Only include this component when a matching '--flavor' is specified on 'zarf package create'.

localOS.description: Only deploy component to specified OS.

ZarfFile.description: ZarfFile defines a file to deploy.

executable.description: (files only) Determines if the file should be made executable during package deploy.

extractPath.description: Local folder or file to be extracted from a 'source' archive.

shasum.description: (files only) Optional SHA256 checksum of the file.

source.description: Local folder or file path or remote URL to pull into the package.

symlinks.description: List of symlinks to create during package deploy.

target.description: The absolute or relative path where the file or folder should be copied to during package deploy.

template.description: Template enables go-template processing on this file during deploy.

ZarfImage.description: ZarfImage defines an OCI image to include in the package.

source.description: The source to pull the image from. Defaults to "registry".

ZarfManifest.description: ZarfManifest defines raw manifests Zarf will deploy as a helm chart.

files.description: List of local K8s YAML files or remote URLs to deploy (in order).

kustomizations.description: List of local kustomization paths or remote URLs to include in the package.

kustomizeAllowAnyDirectory.description: Allow traversing directory above the current directory if needed for kustomization. (Defaults to false)

name.description: A name to give this collection of manifests; this will become the name of the dynamically-created helm chart.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the manifests to.

serverSideApply.description:
Controls whether Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) is used during deploy.
  - "true":  always use SSA
  - "false": always use CSA
  - "auto":  use SSA for fresh installs; for upgrades, match whichever strategy
             was used when the chart was first installed
Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

template.description: Template enables go-template processing on these manifests during deploy.

wait.description: Whether to wait for manifest resources to be ready before continuing. Defaults to true.

ZarfMetadata.description: ZarfMetadata lists information about the current ZarfPackage.

allowNamespaceOverride.description: Whether to allow namespace overrides for this package.

annotations.description: Annotations are key-value pairs that can be used to store metadata about the package.

architecture.description: The target cluster architecture for this package.

description.description: Additional information about this Zarf package.

name.description: Name to identify this Zarf package.

version.description: Generic string set by a package author to track the package version (Note: ZarfInitConfigs will always be versioned to the CLIVersion they were created with).

ZarfValues.description: ZarfValues defines values files and schema for templating and overriding Helm values.

files.description: List of values file paths to include.

schema.description: Path to a JSON schema file for validating values.

description: ZarfPackage the top-level structure of a Zarf config file.

apiVersion.description: The API version of the Zarf package.

components.description: List of components to deploy in this package.

constants.description: Constant template values applied on deploy for K8s resources.

values.description: Values imports Zarf values files for templating.

variables.description: Variable template values applied on deploy for K8s resources.
